arts.ttl: Pundit makes prediction for 'huge' Stoke City clash with Cardiff amid Tony Pulis confession
arts.sum: Former Cardiff striker Blake is on duty with Radio Stoke this weekend for a clash between two teams separated by just two points at the bottom of the Championship with only four games remaining after this one. The winner of Stoke City’s six-pointer with Cardiff will be the team that shows the most aggression, pundit Nathan Blake predicts.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins' message to Stoke City players ahead of crucial trip to Cardiff
arts.sum: He said at his pre-match press conference this morning: “As you expect from the game and in the moment, the disappointment that you feel in those circumstances occur and the fact that it’s happened three times in six games hurts, there’s no doubt about it – but you have to quickly get over it. Mark Robins wants his Stoke City players to embrace and enjoy the challenge as they head to Cardiff in a potentially pivotal game at the bottom of the Championship.

arts.ttl: ‘Similar to us’ – Stoke City verdict delivered by Championship boss
arts.sum: Stoke City are ‘similar’ to Cardiff City, the Bluebirds’ boss Omer Riza believes. Stoke City head to the… The post ‘Similar to us’ – Stoke City verdict delivered by Championship boss appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Huge band coming to bet365 Stadium for first ever Stoke-on-Trent gig
arts.sum: Boyzlife will take to the stage as part of series of summer events at the Stoke City ground's new outdoor fan zone, the Boothen Quarter. Both bands will be supported by acts local to the Stoke-on-Trent area; John Dhali and a 90s/00s set from DJ Lauren May preceding Boyzlife and Lissy Taylor and Foarn opening the show for the Twang.

arts.ttl: Championship: Predictions for all 12 weekend games
arts.sum: The finishing line is coming into view in the Championship but there remains plenty to play for as Aaron Ashley previews all 12 games in the second tier this weekend.
